invalid_system_mode.message: The requested system mode is not supported: {error}

mode_cant_be_temporary.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support 'Duration' or 'Period'

mode_cant_have_duration.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support 'Duration'; use 'Period' instead

mode_cant_have_period.message: The mode `{mode}` does not support 'Period'; use 'Duration' instead

mode_not_supported.message: The mode `{mode}` is not supported by this controller

clear_zone_override.description: Sets the zone to follow its schedule.
clear_zone_override.name: Clear zone override

refresh_system.description: Pulls the latest data from the vendor's servers now, rather than waiting for the next scheduled update.
refresh_system.name: Refresh system

reset_system.description: Sets the system mode to `Auto` mode and resets all the zones to follow their schedules. Not all Evohome systems support this feature (i.e. `AutoWithReset` mode).
reset_system.name: Reset system

set_dhw_override.description: Overrides the DHW state, either indefinitely or for a specified duration, after which it will revert to following its schedule.

duration.description: The DHW will revert to its schedule after this time. If 0 the change is until the next scheduled setpoint.
duration.name: Duration

state.description: The DHW state: True (on: heat the water up to the setpoint) or False (off).
state.name: State

set_dhw_override.name: Set DHW override

set_system_mode.description: Sets the system mode, either indefinitely or until a specified end time, after which it will revert to `Auto`. Not all systems support all modes.

duration.description: The duration in hours; used only with `AutoWithEco` mode (up to 24 hours).
duration.name: Duration

mode.description: Mode to set the system to.
mode.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::mode%]

period.description: A period of time in days; used only with `Away`, `DayOff`, or `Custom` mode. The system will revert to `Auto` mode at midnight (up to 99 days, today is day 1).
period.name: Period

set_system_mode.name: Set system mode

set_zone_override.description: Overrides the zone setpoint, either indefinitely or for a specified duration, after which it will revert to following its schedule.

duration.description: The zone will revert to its schedule after this time. If 0 the change is until the next scheduled setpoint.
duration.name: Duration

setpoint.description: The temperature to be used instead of the scheduled setpoint.
setpoint.name: Setpoint

set_zone_override.name: Set zone override
